text.hero-sub: Full-stack developer & designer based in Singapore. I turn ideas into products that people actually love to use.
text.contact-text: I'm always open to interesting collaborations, freelance work, or just a good conversation about design and technology.
text.contact-quote: Good work takes time. Let's make something worth it.

projects.title: Design System Builder
projects.desc: A drag-and-drop tool for creating and exporting consistent UI design systems. Used by 200+ teams worldwide.

projects.title: Smart Receipt Scanner
projects.desc: Mobile app using computer vision to automatically parse and categorise receipts for personal finance tracking.

projects.title: Analytics Platform
projects.desc: Real-time analytics dashboard for e-commerce brands with beautiful data visualisations and export tools.

experience.desc: Built internal tooling for the operations team, cutting manual processes by 40%.
Designed and built websites for local nonprofits, helping 3 organisations establish their digital presence.
Assisted in research on AI-powered accessibility tools. Co-authored a paper on inclusive design.

achievements.title: Best Final Year Project — NUS School of Computing
achievements.desc: Awarded top honours for an AI-powered accessibility tool that assists visually impaired users.

achievements.title: Hackathon Winner — HackSG 2023
achievements.desc: First place in a 48-hour national hackathon with 150+ competing teams.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Developer – Associate
achievements.desc: Certified in cloud architecture, serverless computing, and deploying scalable applications on AWS.
